title: Party Time Mod
description: A simple mod that adds party decorations.
body:
Welcome to the Party Time Mod, where the festivities never end! Transform your Minecraft world into a vibrant celebration with a delightful assortment of party decorations. From cheerful balloons that float gently in the air to colorful streamers that add a festive touch to any space, this mod brings an abundance of joy to your in-game gatherings. Whether you're marking a special occasion, hosting a lively event, or simply want to infuse your world with a sense of festivity, the Party Time Mod has everything you need to ensure that every moment is filled with fun and excitement. Get ready to elevate your Minecraft experience with the Party Time Mod and let the good times roll! 

Note: Requires Passionfruit API, Some things in the description are not in the mod yet, they will be added later. Non-Release versions may be unstable.
